PROP-01b-partial1-pre-001.text: bid() must reject bids where bidUsdValue is below minBidUsdValue threshold.
PROP-01b-partial1-pre-001.assertion: forall bid(asset,amount,data): bidUsdValue(amount) >= minBidUsdValue => proceed; else revert BidValueTooLow

locations.note: BidValueTooLow revert at lines 433-434; s_minBidUsdValue loaded at line 431
